title: In the Air Tonight

earnings.assumptions: The headline range is treated as artist-side participation, with gross track, label, publishing, and writer lanes modeled from catalog streaming, sync, and rediscovery behavior.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label Face Value master in current digital catalog availability.
ownership.publishing_owner: Phil Collins is modeled with meaningful writer-side participation because he wrote the song.
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled.
ownership.notes: The estimate separates gross track economics from artist-side and writer-side participation rather than treating all revenue as performer income.

meaning_summary: Its distinctive mood and instantly recognizable drum break keep it commercially durable in both streaming and sync contexts.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and classic-pop playlists sustain recurring listening.
Sync and viral rediscovery can materially lift the baseline.
Strong cultural memory keeps the track relevant across generations.
